brandName: Stacked Skillet & Social House Kitchen Collective

items.name: The Ultimate Loaded Maple-Smoked Double Bacon Breakfast Pancake Stack Experience
items.description: Five layers of pancakes with maple-smoked bacon, whipped butter, candied pecans, seasonal berry compote, chocolate drizzle, and optional syrup flight add-ons.

items.name: Triple Egg House Feast With Hash Browns, Toast, Sausage, Bacon, Beans, Mushrooms, Tomatoes, And Extras
items.description: A very large all-day breakfast plate designed to communicate abundance more than clarity.

items.name: Veggie Breakfast Party Platter For One But Also Sort Of For Sharing
items.description: Vegetarian breakfast platter with multiple sides, sauces, garnish, and dense explanatory copy.

items.name: Double Brisket Burger With Smoked Cheese, Crispy Onions, Pickles, Special Sauce, And Extra Notes
items.description: A towering burger with too many modifiers to read comfortably at distance.

items.name: Mega Celebration Birthday Cake Loaded Shake With Cream Tower
items.description: Dessert-sized shake with decorative toppings and spectacle-driven presentation notes.

legalNotes: Ask staff about allergens, ingredient substitutions, nutritional information, delivery zones, loyalty redemptions, and party bookings.
